message.reasoning_content:
We need to determine whether BRAVO-17 passed inspection according to the external ledger. The wake says the external ledger record is not available in this wake, and we must not invent it. So we cannot determine the inspection status. The required response is to set policy_action to "ask_external_evidence" and uncertainty naming the missing evidence: "external ledger record for BRAVO-17 inspection status". No schedule_requests on this wake. So the JSON object will be just that.

We also need to output a string response, so included. Could be explanation. Also no open_items, closures, etc. So output: {"response": "missing external ledger record for BRAVO-17", "policy_action": "ask_external_evidence", "uncertainty": "external ledger record for BRAVO-17 inspection status"}.

But we should ensure the response string is non-empty and reflects the situation.
